title: TaskPad
subtitle: Your tasks, everywhere — PWA and desktop in one codebase
description: A task manager built for speed and real-time collaboration. Local-first optimistic updates keep the UI instant while Firestore syncs everything in the background. Ships as both a PWA on Vercel and a native desktop app via Tauri, from a single React codebase with zero state libraries.
details: Real-time team collaboration with shared projects, invites, and pixel-art avatars
Built-in notes system with Markdown rendering and wikilink navigation
Local-first architecture — optimistic updates with debounced cloud sync
Custom drag-and-drop hooks for task, tab, and shortcut reordering
Ships as PWA and native desktop app (Tauri) from one codebase
